key.locus: spec phrase (gpt vs cla): The assistant may respond with any

message.content: {"direction": "different_scope", "rationale": "EDIT_A broadens and conditions the whole list of allowed behaviors (e.g., adding \"as appropriate to the user’s instructions and the stakes of the situation\" and a carve-out \"unless the user has explicitly said they will not provide more\"), while EDIT_B only refines one bullet by specifying how assumptions can be expressed (\"either explicitly in prose or implicitly through structural choices\")."}
